text:
Market today: Mixed. Geopolitical tensions are high, pushing oil up and creating uncertainty. However, positive news for chips/tech from China exports and Taiwan's production expansion are positive signals for the core holdings.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.02%) and SPAL (-34%) are both leveraged ETFs showing deep drawdowns; margin amplifies these losses. QQQI (-1.77%) is also flagged for a trim.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical tensions impacting oil prices, as this can create broader market instability. Also, watch for any follow-through on positive chip sector news.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions aggressively while monitoring geopolitical risks and underlying tech sector strength.
plays: Actively manage SOXL, currently down -35.02%, by setting a tighter stop or considering a trim due to its leveraged decay.
Review SPAL, down -34% since new; its leveraged nature and significant loss warrant a close stop below 21.38.
Consider trimming QQQI, as flagged by your scanner, and respect its stop at 52.
